summary: In this episode of This or That with Bhartendra Singh, I sit down with Pooja Bhinde, Certified Financial Planner, to uncover the truth about money. We cover:

chapters.label: Intro: Why talk about money, not returns
Warren Buffett, CAGR, and return obsession
What Can We Control About Our Investments ? SIP Example
IPO, Direct Equity or Equity Mutual Funds
What is the Right Approach to Financial Planning ?
What Does it Take to Be Successful with Money ?
Real money stories: househelp, retirees, professionals

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.
